title: Now Hiring Production Engineer at Shree Cement Ventures Solutions

jsonLd.title: Now Hiring Production Engineer at Shree Cement Ventures Solutions
jsonLd.description:
Shree Cement Ventures Solutions is actively seeking a talented and motivated Production Engineer to join our dynamic team in Meerut. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Shree Cement Ventures Solutions:
Shree Cement Ventures Solutions is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in FMEA
• Proficiency in ISO 9001
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in Quality Control
• Proficiency in APQP
• Proficiency in 5S
• Proficiency in PPAP

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Meerut, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Shree Cement Ventures Solutions!
